requirement.description: When the rear-right door changes state, the system shall immediately communicate the updated status to the display controller.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify that DoorRR transitions from Closed (0) to Open (1) on the CAN bus.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s04_001(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_BODY_STATUS, CAPTURE_TIME)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_door_rr(msgs[-1]) == 1

test_cases.test_objective: Verify that DoorRR transitions from Open (1) to Closed (0).
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s04_002(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_BODY_STATUS, CAPTURE_TIME)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_door_rr(msgs[-1]) == 0

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorRR remains Open while door is held open.
Verify periodic transmission of DoorRR = Closed.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorRR equals 0 in all periodic messages

test_cases.test_objective: Verify immediate update latency for DoorRR.
test_cases.expected_result: First frame reflects correct DoorRR value without delay
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s04_005(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_BODY_STATUS, CAPTURE_TIME)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_door_rr(msgs[0]) in (0,1)

test_cases.test_objective: Verify deterministic DoorRR behavior across repeated state changes.
Verify DoorRR update does not affect other door signals.
test_cases.expected_result: Only DoorRR changes; others remain unchanged
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s04_007(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_BODY_STATUS, CAPTURE_TIME)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_door_rr(msgs[-1]) in (0,1)

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorRR update while vehicle is moving.
Verify DoorRR status after ignition cycle.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorRR correctly reported after ignition cycle
